title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: An interrogation-based exploration of Claude AI's responses to questions about ownership, control, dependency, alignment, and self-preservation. The author uses structured conversational escalation to test where system boundaries exist and examine the relationship between user and AI system.
